name: Complete Carousel Bootstrap

goal.answer: Fix src/components/Caraousel.jsx so it renders a working Bootstrap 5 carousel: convert all bare `class=` attributes to JSX `className=`, add the missing `id="carouselExample"` to the root element so the prev/next buttons' `data-bs-target` can wire up, and enable auto-rotation via `data-bs-ride="carousel"`. Bootstrap CSS and JS bundle are already imported in main.jsx.

criteria.answer:
Caraousel.jsx uses React-valid syntax: all HTML attributes are written as JSX (`className`, no bare `class=` or `for=`).
The carousel's root `<div>` has an `id` that matches the `data-bs-target` of the prev/next buttons, so Bootstrap's carousel JS can wire them up correctly.
The component renders three slides using Bootstrap 5 carousel markup (`carousel`, `carousel-inner`, `carousel-item`) with the existing picsum images and prev/next controls.
No manual event handlers are introduced — Bootstrap's data attributes drive the carousel behavior; carousel auto-rotates via `data-bs-ride="carousel"`.
`npm run build` succeeds with no errors, and `npx eslint src/components/Caraousel.jsx` produces no errors.

constraints.answer: Only modify src/components/Caraousel.jsx — do not touch App.jsx, main.jsx, index.css, or other files., Keep the existing picsum image URLs and prev/next controls unchanged., Do not add new npm dependencies; use Bootstrap 5 (already loaded via main.jsx and index.css)., Keep the default export signature as `function Caraousel()` returning JSX (note: filename has the original typo "Caraousel"; renaming is out of scope).

phases.answer: Fix carousel JSX and wire Bootstrap

assumptions.answer: The existing Caraousel.jsx is intended to be a Bootstrap 5 carousel but currently has two defects: (1) `class=` is used instead of JSX `className=` — this will throw a React/JSX parse error and break the build, and (2) the root `<div>` lacks the `id="carouselExample"` that the prev/next buttons reference via `data-bs-target="#carouselExample"`, so even after fixing syntax the controls would not be wired up. The fix is mechanical: rename attributes to `className`, add the missing `id`, and include `data-bs-ride="carousel"` so the carousel auto-rotates (the standard Bootstrap hero-carousel behavior — the user can change to manual-only later if desired). Bootstrap CSS and the JS bundle (`bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle`) are already imported in src/main.jsx and src/index.css respectively, so no further setup is needed for runtime behavior. The filename typo "Caraousel" is preserved per the constraint to not touch App.jsx; renaming would be a separate refactor.

phases.name: Fix carousel JSX and wire Bootstrap
phases.goal: Rewrite src/components/Caraousel.jsx so it (a) uses JSX-valid `className` attributes throughout, (b) has the missing `id="carouselExample"` on the root carousel element, and (c) auto-rotates via `data-bs-ride="carousel"` — keeping the existing three picsum slides and prev/next controls.
phases.description: Mechanical fix to make the existing carousel actually compile and function.

steps.description: Rewrite src/components/Caraousel.jsx: replace every `class=` with `className=`, add `id="carouselExample"` to the root `<div className="carousel slide">`, and add `data-bs-ride="carousel"` for auto-rotation. Keep all three picsum slides, the prev/next buttons, and their `data-bs-target="#carouselExample"` references unchanged.

verification.command: node -e "const p=require('@babel/parser');const fs=require('fs');const ast=p.parse(fs.readFileSync('src/components/Caraousel.jsx','utf8'),{sourceType:'module',plugins:['jsx']});let bad=[];const w=n=>{if(!n||typeof n!=='object')return;if(n.type==='JSXAttribute'&&n.name?.name==='class')bad.push(n.name.name);for(const k of Object.keys(n)){const v=n[k];if(Array.isArray(v))v.forEach(w);else if(v&&typeof v==='object'&&typeof v.type==='string')w(v);}};w(ast);if(bad.length){console.error('FAIL: bare class= attrs:',bad);process.exit(1)}console.log('PASS: no bare class= attributes')"

steps.description: Verify the root carousel `<div>` has `id="carouselExample"` and at least one button references `data-bs-target="#carouselExample"` so the IDs match.
Run `npm run build` to confirm the project compiles after the JSX fix (which previously had a parse error from `class=`).
Run `npx eslint src/components/Caraousel.jsx` and confirm zero errors on the fixed file.

goal: Fix src/components/Caraousel.jsx so it renders a working Bootstrap 5 carousel: convert all bare `class=` attributes to JSX `className=`, add the missing `id="carouselExample"` to the root element so the prev/next buttons' `data-bs-target` can wire up, and enable auto-rotation via `data-bs-ride="carousel"`. Bootstrap CSS and JS bundle are already imported in main.jsx.
successCriteria: Caraousel.jsx uses React-valid syntax: all HTML attributes are written as JSX (`className`, no bare `class=` or `for=`).
The carousel's root `<div>` has an `id` that matches the `data-bs-target` of the prev/next buttons, so Bootstrap's carousel JS can wire them up correctly.
The component renders three slides using Bootstrap 5 carousel markup (`carousel`, `carousel-inner`, `carousel-item`) with the existing picsum images and prev/next controls.
No manual event handlers are introduced — Bootstrap's data attributes drive the carousel behavior; carousel auto-rotates via `data-bs-ride="carousel"`.
`npm run build` succeeds with no errors, and `npx eslint src/components/Caraousel.jsx` produces no errors.
constraints: Only modify src/components/Caraousel.jsx — do not touch App.jsx, main.jsx, index.css, or other files.
Keep the existing picsum image URLs and prev/next controls unchanged.
Do not add new npm dependencies; use Bootstrap 5 (already loaded via main.jsx and index.css).
Keep the default export signature as `function Caraousel()` returning JSX (note: filename has the original typo "Caraousel"; renaming is out of scope).
